prerequisite_reason: Bank-Grade final_score 2.9 < 9.0 required for Government-Grade. G-GAP assessed for readiness only. Remediate B-GAP first.

external_dependencies.blocker: No SITA framework engagement; no SSP; no 3PAO; no control evidence for 325 FedRAMP Moderate controls
No CMVP certificate in repo; KMS signing module configured for FIPS 140-2 Level 2 (not Level 3 for key generation)
No personnel security policy; no SA citizenship or security clearance requirements documented; no clearances obtained
No 24/7 SOC operational (target 2027-Q1); SIEM evaluation pending; MTTR ~8 hours (target < 1 hour); threat intel feeds mostly planned
Zero-trust Linkerd mesh policies and NetworkPolicies configured in overlays but ADR-013 Phase 1 only complete; not operationally validated by red team

controls.name: Data sovereignty (no cross-border without MoU)
controls.evidence: Production terraform defaults to af-south-1 with 3 AZs. No dedicated data-localization architecture doc. Cross-border transfers documented in POPIA registration: US backup (AWS DPA+SCCs), LLM inference to US (under negotiation), SendGrid US (DPA signed), Zimbabwe/Nigeria (MoU in development). POPIA Information Officer appointment pending (target 2026-06-30).

controls.name: Air-gapped deployment option
controls.evidence: Air-gapped deployment architecture doc exists and is comprehensive (docs/architecture/air-gapped-deployment.md). controls.name: 99.99% uptime SLA (52.6m downtime/year)
controls.evidence: No uptime evidence documents found. No multi-region production terraform configuration (single region af-south-1). SLO targets in specs are 99.5%-99.9%, not 99.99%. Resilience framework mentions 99.99% for PvP settlement only. Master audit report notes SLO dashboards and burn-rate alerts but no 6-month historical uptime evidence.

controls.name: Zero-trust architecture (mTLS, micro-segmentation)
controls.evidence: Linkerd mesh authorization policies exist for production and staging (deny-by-default, per-service allowlists). NetworkPolicies exist for production (default deny ingress/egress). ADR-013 (mTLS service mesh) accepted with Linkerd selected. Namespace annotations for sidecar injection prepared. ADR states Phase 1 complete, Phase 2 scheduled Q3 2026. Not yet operationally validated by red team.

recommendations: CRITICAL: Achieve Bank-Grade certification (>= 9.0) before pursuing Government-Grade. Current B-GAP final_score 2.9.
Engage SITA framework and begin FedRAMP Moderate / SITA equivalent SSP with 3PAO.
Upgrade KMS signing module to FIPS 140-2 Level 3 for key generation, or obtain CMVP certificate for current Level 2 HSM backing.
Create docs/hr/personnel-security-policy.md with SA citizenship and security clearance requirements for critical roles.
Complete POPIA Information Officer appointment and obtain FSCA/FIC registrations to operationalize FICA compliance.
Establish 24/7 SOC with SIEM integration (target 2027-Q1) and reduce MTTR to < 1 hour.
Operationalize Linkerd mTLS mesh (Phase 2 Q3 2026) and validate zero-trust with red team exercise.
Draft dedicated audit-committee-terms.md document (separate from board-security-committee-charter).
Build and test air-gapped offline replica; configure Harbor registry mirroring with evidence.
Deploy multi-region hot-standby or document 6-month historical uptime evidence supporting 99.99% SLA.
